requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (MASM conformity + MNS/IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（MASM合格认证 + MNS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（MASM合格認證 + MNS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering the Mongolian market are subject to conformity certification administered by MASM （Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology） for regulated electrical products. The applicable safety basis is the Mongolian national standard （MNS） series adopting IEC 60335-2-24 （Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, read together with the general standard adopting IEC 60335-1. Because Mongolia is not an EAEU member, it operates a national conformity regime rather than the EAC mark. Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of the housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings. Mongolia's nominal grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — identical to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal — so no voltage or frequency re-rating of the appliance is required, which materially reduces the engineering adaptation versus markets with a different grid.
summary.zh: 进入蒙古市场的家用制冷器具须接受由MASM（蒙古标准计量署）对受监管电气产品实施的合格认证。适用的安全依据为采用IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）的蒙古国家标准（MNS）系列，并与采用IEC 60335-1的通用标准结合使用。由于蒙古非欧亚经济联盟成员，其实行国家合格认证制度而非EAC标志。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。蒙古标称电网为220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国220/380 V 50 Hz标称值一致——因此器具无需重新进行电压或频率定额，相较电网不同的市场显著减少了工程适配工作。
summary.zht: 進入蒙古市場的家用製冷器具須接受由MASM（蒙古標準計量署）對受監管電氣產品實施的合格認證。適用的安全依據為採用IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）的蒙古國家標準（MNS）系列，並與採用IEC 60335-1的通用標準結合使用。由於蒙古非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，其實行國家合格認證制度而非EAC標誌。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。蒙古標稱電網為220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國220/380 V 50 Hz標稱值一致——因此器具無需重新進行電壓或頻率定額，相較電網不同的市場顯著減少了工程適配工作。

standards_or_laws: MASM conformity certification regime — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology （national regulated-product certification; Mongolia is not an EAEU member）

MNS IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers （Mongolian adoption of IEC 60335-2-24）
MNS IEC 60335-1 — General requirements （Mongolian adoption of IEC 60335-1; read in conjunction with Part 2-24）

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 （Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification （CCC） regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because Mongolia's MNS standards and China's GB 4706.13 both trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying technical requirements are closely aligned; however, CCC certificates and GB-referenced test reports are not automatically recognised by MASM — a separate Mongolian conformity certification step is required.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于蒙古MNS标准与中国GB 4706.13均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，底层技术要求高度对齐；但CCC证书及GB依据的检测报告不被MASM自动承认——须另行完成蒙古合格认证步骤。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於蒙古MNS標準與中國GB 4706.13均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，底層技術要求高度對齊；但CCC證書及GB依據的檢測報告不被MASM自動承認——須另行完成蒙古合格認證步驟。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers （mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA）
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements （read in conjunction with GB 4706.13）

gap.en: Because both Mongolia （MNS/IEC 60335-2-24） and China （GB 4706.13） derive from the same IEC base, the substantive electrical-safety design requirements largely overlap and the matching 220/380 V 50 Hz grid means no re-rating. The remaining gaps are procedural: （1） MASM conformity — products must undergo Mongolian conformity certification; a CCC certificate alone does not grant market access. （2） Test report acceptance — manufacturers should confirm whether MASM accepts IECEE CB Scheme reports （IEC 60335-2-24 basis） or requires testing at a MASM-recognised laboratory; an existing CB certificate covering the IEC standard is the strongest lever to reduce re-testing. （3） Documentation — declaration of conformity referencing the relevant MNS/IEC standard, appliance markings, and Mongolian-language safety information per importer/MASM requirements. China-specific national deviations in GB 4706.13 should be reviewed against the MNS/IEC text, though the gap is expected to be narrow given the shared IEC lineage.
gap.zh: 由于蒙古（MNS/IEC 60335-2-24）与中国（GB 4706.13）均源自相同的IEC基础，实质性电气安全设计要求大体重叠，且220/380 V 50 Hz电网一致意味着无需重新定额。剩余差距为程序性：（1）MASM合格认证——产品须完成蒙古合格认证；仅凭CCC证书不能获得市场准入。（2）检测报告接受——制造商应确认MASM是否接受IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）或要求在MASM认可实验室检测；已涵盖该IEC标准的现有CB证书是减少重新检测的最有力依据。（3）文件——引用相关MNS/IEC标准的符合性声明、器具标识，以及依进口商/MASM要求的蒙古语安全信息。GB 4706.13中的中国特定国家偏差应对照MNS/IEC正文审查，但鉴于共享IEC谱系，预计差距较小。
gap.zht: 由於蒙古（MNS/IEC 60335-2-24）與中國（GB 4706.13）均源自相同的IEC基礎，實質性電氣安全設計要求大體重疊，且220/380 V 50 Hz電網一致意味著無需重新定額。剩餘差距為程序性：（1）MASM合格認證——產品須完成蒙古合格認證；僅憑CCC證書不能獲得市場准入。（2）檢測報告接受——製造商應確認MASM是否接受IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）或要求在MASM認可實驗室檢測；已涵蓋該IEC標準的現有CB證書是減少重新檢測的最有力依據。（3）文件——引用相關MNS/IEC標準的符合性聲明、器具標識，以及依進口商/MASM要求的蒙古語安全資訊。GB 4706.13中的中國特定國家偏差應對照MNS/IEC正文審查，但鑑於共享IEC譜系，預計差距較小。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MASM conformity certification required for regulated electrical products before placement on the Mongolian market; MNS/IEC 60335-2-24 is the applicable safety standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MASM conformity certification to MNS/IEC 60335-2-24 is the safety gate for household refrigerators entering Mongolia. Because both Mongolian MNS and Chinese GB 4706.13 adopt IEC 60335-2-24 and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grids match, the technical adaptation is limited; the main task is procedural conformity certification through MASM, ideally leveraging an IECEE CB Scheme report. Confirm test-report acceptance and Mongolian-language documentation with MASM or the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据MNS/IEC 60335-2-24的MASM合格认证是家用电冰箱进入蒙古的安全门槛。由于蒙古MNS与中国GB 4706.13均采用IEC 60335-2-24且220/380 V 50 Hz电网一致，技术适配有限；主要任务是通过MASM完成程序性合格认证，宜借助IECEE CB体系报告。请向MASM或境内进口商确认检测报告接受情况及蒙古语文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據MNS/IEC 60335-2-24的MASM合格認證是家用電冰箱進入蒙古的安全門檻。由於蒙古MNS與中國GB 4706.13均採用IEC 60335-2-24且220/380 V 50 Hz電網一致，技術適配有限；主要任務是通過MASM完成程序性合格認證，宜借助IECEE CB體系報告。請向MASM或境內進口商確認檢測報告接受情況及蒙古語文件要求。
